tasks.correctAnswer: There are three books on the table
January is the first month of the year
I want to become an engineer

lessons.title: Глаголы в настоящем времени
lessons.description: Собери предложения с глаголами в настоящем

tasks.correctAnswer: Can we go to the park?
Yesterday I was at the museum

lessons.title: Прошедшее время (регулярные глаголы)
lessons.description: Собери предложения с правильными глаголами в прошлом

tasks.correctAnswer: Tomorrow I will go to school
We will have dinner at seven

tasks.translation: Она не умеет играть на гитаре

tasks.correctAnswer: The book is on the table
The cat is under the bed
My house is bigger than yours
She is the smartest in the class

tasks.translation: Она никогда не была в Лондоне
tasks.correctAnswer: She has never been to London
The table is made of wood

tasks.translation: Дом будет построен в следующем году
tasks.correctAnswer: The house will be built next year

tasks.translation: Если я выиграю, я куплю машину
tasks.correctAnswer: If I win, I will buy a car
If you call, I will come

tasks.translation: Если будет дождь, мы останемся дома
tasks.correctAnswer: If it rains, we will stay at home
He said that he was tired
We decided that we would go tomorrow

lessons.title: Отрицания в разных временах
lessons.description: Собери отрицательные предложения в разных временах

tasks.correctAnswer: I do not know the answer

lessons.title: Оборот There is / There are
lessons.description: Собери предложения с оборотом there is/are

tasks.correctAnswer: There is a book on the table
There are many flowers in the garden
There is no milk in the fridge
He often goes to the cinema
She is wearing a beautiful dress
It is very cold in winter
In summer we go to the sea
There is a sofa in the living room
She is a doctor, she treats people
We are looking for a new job

tasks.translation: Я играю в теннис по выходным

tasks.correctAnswer: There is a good restaurant here
I am going to the library
How can I get to the square?
He needs to see a doctor
My parents live in the countryside
We go to the cinema together
We are planning a trip to the mountains
I have already booked a hotel
I want to buy a new phone
We have been to the Tretyakov Gallery

tasks.translation: Этот художник известен во всем мире
tasks.correctAnswer: This artist is famous all over the world

tasks.translation: Я хожу в спортзал дважды в неделю
tasks.correctAnswer: I go to the gym twice a week

lessons.title: Еда и рестораны
lessons.description: Собери предложения о еде в ресторане

tasks.correctAnswer: I would like to order a steak
What time does the film start?
My train leaves at 8 in the morning
I will be free in an hour
This is a very interesting book
I am going to study Spanish
She wants to open her own business

tasks.translation: Мы поедем в отпуск в июле
tasks.correctAnswer: We will go on holiday in July

tasks.translation: Это так же хорошо, как и раньше
tasks.correctAnswer: It is as good as before
He works harder than I do

lessons.title: Причины и следствия
lessons.description: Собери предложения с союзами because, so

tasks.translation: Я не пошел на вечеринку, потому что был болен
tasks.correctAnswer: I did not go to the party because I was sick

tasks.translation: Было жарко, поэтому мы открыли окно
tasks.correctAnswer: It was hot, so we opened the window

tasks.translation: Она пришла рано, чтобы не опоздать
tasks.correctAnswer: She came early so that she would not be late

tasks.translation: Если бы я был миллионером, я бы путешествовал
tasks.correctAnswer: If I were a millionaire, I would travel

tasks.translation: Если бы она знала, она бы пришла
tasks.correctAnswer: If she knew, she would come

tasks.translation: Если бы мы жили у моря, мы бы купались каждый день
tasks.correctAnswer: If we lived by the sea, we would swim every day

lessons.title: Пассивный залог (настоящее)
lessons.description: Собери предложения в Present Simple Passive

tasks.correctAnswer: This bridge is being built now

lessons.title: Пассивный залог (прошедшее)
lessons.description: Собери предложения в Past Simple Passive

tasks.correctAnswer: The painting was painted in the 19th century

tasks.translation: Дом был построен три года назад
tasks.correctAnswer: The house was built three years ago

tasks.translation: Ему не следует так много работать
tasks.correctAnswer: He should not work so much
How much did they pay for this?

tasks.translation: Он сказал, что работает в банке
tasks.correctAnswer: He said that he works in a bank

She asked if I would come

tasks.translation: Мы спросили, не знает ли он ответа
tasks.correctAnswer: We asked if he knew the answer
He wants to become a doctor
I know that you are right

We think that the weather will improve

tasks.translation: Человек, который там стоит, - мой брат
tasks.correctAnswer: The man who is standing there is my brother

tasks.translation: Город, где я вырос, очень красивый
tasks.correctAnswer: The city where I grew up is very beautiful

tasks.translation: Хотя было поздно, он продолжал работать
tasks.correctAnswer: Although it was late, he continued working

tasks.translation: Несмотря на дождь, мы пошли гулять
tasks.correctAnswer: Despite the rain, we went for a walk

tasks.translation: Он не сдался, даже когда все думали иначе
tasks.correctAnswer: He did not give up even when everyone thought otherwise

tasks.translation: Жаль, что я не пришел раньше
tasks.correctAnswer: I wish I had come earlier

tasks.translation: Ему хотелось бы, чтобы она позвонила

lessons.title: Эмфатические конструкции
lessons.description: Собери предложения с it is... that...

tasks.correctAnswer: It was he who did it
It was yesterday that we met
It is here that I was born

lessons.title: Итоговый урок
lessons.description: Собери сложные предложения на все темы

tasks.translation: Несмотря на то что было трудно, мы закончили проект вовремя
tasks.correctAnswer: Although it was difficult, we finished the project on time

tasks.translation: Если бы я знал, я бы помог тебе
tasks.correctAnswer: If I had known, I would have helped you

tasks.translation: Я хочу, чтобы ты знал, как я тебя ценю
tasks.correctAnswer: I want you to know how much I appreciate you
